do: Pick color for meaning, appearance (filled/outlined/ghost) for weight, shape (round/square) for style.
Pair the color with text or an icon — never color alone.
dont: Don't make a Badge interactive — for toggleable chips use toggle / toggle-group, for actions use button.

boundaries: Axes are color (8 values) × appearance × size × shape — there is no single shadcn-style variant prop.
